finding: Three sessions (March 22-30) were spent building and running the Artcraft project (storytold/artcraft), a third-party AI image/video generation app. The user is not a contributor (commits are by 'BFlat'). The sessions were lightweight (just build/run commands), but the project has no visible connection to any stated goal. This could be helping a friend, evaluating technology, or exploring for fun -- if intentional, consider adding it to goals or noting the connection.
